# Chain log fixtures (#479 Layer E)

This directory holds canned chain logs used by the `verify-chain-logs`
CI step to regression-check the `signal_verify` watchdog tool.

The fixture is **not** generated by running the live sim. It is
synthesized by `tools/gen_chain_fixture.c` directly from a fixed
station seed (32 bytes of `0x42`) so that:

- The output is byte-for-byte deterministic across machines and across
  changes to sim event semantics.
- Regenerating it requires an explicit, intentional rebuild of the
  generator. Sim drift cannot silently bit-rot the fixture.

## Files

- `3F5qRPtKg8GhGNnbd3qCj6nVJxWsGxq7pvH84okYLAqf.log` — 48-event log
  covering all six event types (SMELT, CRAFT, TRANSFER, TRADE, LEDGER,
  ROCK_DESTROY) signed by the deterministic station key.
- `3F5qRPtKg8GhGNnbd3qCj6nVJxWsGxq7pvH84okYLAqf.golden.json` —
  expected JSON output of `signal_verify --report=json` on that log.

## Regenerating

```sh
cc -std=c11 -I shared -I server -I src -I vendor/tweetnacl \
  tools/gen_chain_fixture.c \
  server/chain_log_verify.c \
  vendor/tweetnacl/tweetnacl.c \
  vendor/tweetnacl/randombytes.c \
  vendor/tweetnacl/signal_crypto_tweetnacl.c \
  -o /tmp/gen_chain_fixture
/tmp/gen_chain_fixture tests/fixtures/3F5qRPtKg8GhGNnbd3qCj6nVJxWsGxq7pvH84okYLAqf.log
./build-test/signal_verify --report=json \
  tests/fixtures/3F5qRPtKg8GhGNnbd3qCj6nVJxWsGxq7pvH84okYLAqf.log \
  > tests/fixtures/3F5qRPtKg8GhGNnbd3qCj6nVJxWsGxq7pvH84okYLAqf.golden.json
```

The intentional friction here is the point: a fixture regeneration
must be a reviewed PR, not a silent CI retry.
